title: S'Margritli und d'Soldate
writer: Oskar Friedrich Alfred Bally, August Kern, Richard C. Schmidt
actors: Lilian Hermann, Robert Trösch, Fredy Lucca
plot: 1939, border occupation. Swiss men in uniform spend their time in the service. The only diversion is the excursions to the Cerf country pub. At the center of this 1940 classic is the innkeeper's daughter Marguerite.
